task:
OBJECTIVE: Rewrite the theme of /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/success/page.tsx

Replace all styling to match the main site theme:
- background: #ffffff everywhere
- fontFamily: Inter, sans-serif
- fontSize: 14px throughout
- Remove Georgia serif font
- Remove all #3D5A36 green — replace with #1a1a1a for text
- Remove #FAFAF8 background — use #ffffff

Specific changes:
1. main background: #ffffff, fontFamily Inter, sans-serif
2. h1 "Your word is backed." — fontSize 32px, fontWeight 700, color #1a1a1a, marginBottom 40px
3. All section h2 labels — fontSize 11px, fontWeight 500, letterSpacing 2px, color #9a9a9a, textTransform uppercase, marginBottom 8px
4. All section p content — fontSize 14px, color #1a1a1a, lineHeight 1.7, margin 0
5. Wrap each section in: border 1px solid #e4e4e4, borderRadius 8px, padding 20px 24px, marginBottom 12px, background #fff
6. "I followed through" button — background #1a1a1a, color #fff, border none, borderRadius 6px, padding 14px 28px, fontSize 14px, fontWeight 500, width 100%, marginBottom 12px
7. Footer text — fontSize 13px, color #9a9a9a, fontStyle normal, marginTop 16px

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/success/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
No green anywhere
White background
Inter font
Cards with borders
No TypeScript errors
